854.reason: [The error handling only covers specific missing tokens (SEMICN, RPARENT, RBRACK) but doesn't handle other syntax errors properly. Also, when curPos is 0, tokens.get(curPos-1) would cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [The error handling only covers specific missing tokens (SEMICN, RPARENT, RBRACK) but doesn't handle other syntax errors properly. Also, when curPos is 0, tokens.get(curPos-1) would cause an IndexOutOfBoundsException.]

843.reason: [When curPos is 0, tokens.get(curPos-1) accesses tokens[-1], causing IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrect line number]
